emptyCart.title: Your cart
emptyCart.emptyDesc: You have no items in your shopping cart.

webCheckoutButton.customizedItemPopupDesc: Customised items in your order are made specifically for you and cannot be returned, exchanged, or refunded.
webCheckoutButton.selectGiftReminderDesc: Forgot to select a gift. Please click "Choose Gift" to select a gift. Click "Skip" to give up selecting a gift.

posOnlineCart.title: Online Cart
posOnlineCart.description: Select products from online cart to add to POS.
posOnlineCart.notice: Note: Once products are added to POS, the products will be removed from customers’ online cart.

o2oPushToOnline.title: Do you want to push to online?
o2oPushToOnline.description: Please check all information before proceeding.
o2oPushToOnline.successTip: Order has been pushed to online!

o2oPushToPos.title: Online Cart
o2oPushToPos.description: This customer has an online cart. Add it here?

posProductItem.priceOutdated: Sorry, the price of this product is outdated. Please refresh the cart in order to check out.
posProductItem.outOfStock: Sorry, this product is out of stock. Please remove it in order to check out.
